description: Production catalog of 100 register packs. Each entry is a complete spec for one register pack ratifiable via scripts/ratify_register_packs.py once REGISTER_IDS is widened to include its register_id. Existing ratified packs (status=ratified) appear here as the canonical seven; the remaining ninety-three (status=drafted) need only an author to materialise packs/register/<register_id>.json from the entry below and re-run ratification. See packs/register/CATALOG.md for the production loop. All realizer_overrides keys are restricted to those whitelisted in scripts/ratify_register_packs.py::_KNOWN_OVERRIDE_KEYS (disclosure_domain_count, compress_gloss, drop_articles, drop_provenance_tag, append_semantic_domain_clause, plus per_intent nested block).

groups.A_depth: Depth ladder — varies only disclosure_domain_count + the structural booleans. No discourse markers.
groups.B_tone: Tone family — affective marker palettes; default knobs.
groups.C_stance: Stance family — epistemic posture (assertive, hedged, exploratory, etc.).
groups.D_posture: Posture family — social/relational role (peer, mentor, scholar, etc.).
groups.E_domain: Domain affect — academic, technical, legal, scientific, philosophical, etc.
groups.F_cultural: Cultural register — plainspoken, cosmopolitan, classic, lyrical, etc.
groups.G_affective: Affective register — cheerful, somber, wry, gentle, etc.
groups.H_functional: Functional role — documentary, instructional, persuasive, etc.
groups.I_composite: Composite registers — combine knobs from multiple groups.

registers.description: Default neutral register. Empty realizer overrides and empty discourse markers. Ratification gate is byte-identity with the unregistered realizer path. See ADR-0068.
Terse register. Compresses without-gloss disclosure to one semantic domain. Grounding source and trace hash are invariant against default_neutral_v1; only surface wording varies. See ADR-0070.
Precise register. Standard depth with disclosure_domain_count=2 and drop_provenance_tag=true. Exposes exactly two semantic domains and drops the parenthetical meta-tag.
Between terse and precise — one-domain disclosure but keeps the provenance tag and full articles. The minimum-disclosure register for users who want both brevity and traceability.
registers.author_notes: Drop only the gloss compression; keep tag and articles.

registers.description: Expansive register. Disclosure_domain_count=3 with append_semantic_domain_clause=true to extend pack-grounded definitions with their full semantic-domain context. The default ceiling for depth without per-intent escalation.
registers.author_notes: Append-clause is the load-bearing knob for expansive output.

registers.description: Maximum-disclosure register. Disclosure_domain_count=3 across every intent via per_intent overrides; semantic-domain clause appended; provenance tags retained.
registers.author_notes: Per-intent block forces count=3 on every intent — even ones whose default falls back to 2.

registers.description: Warm conversational register. Soft openings and gentle closings; default depth.

closings: — let me know if any of this is unclear.

registers.author_notes: Empty-string in openings/closings lets seeded selection pick 'no marker this turn'.

registers.description: Cool register — neutral openings, restrained closings.
registers.author_notes: Cool = warm's mirror; same default depth, sharper marker palette.

registers.description: Casual register — light openings, easy closings.
Formal register. Standard depth; restrained marker palette (no convivial fillers).
Intense register — punchy openings, declarative closings.
Playful register — light openings, witty closings.
Calm register — quiet, measured markers; no exclamation.
Dramatic register — emphatic markers, declarative closings.
Clinical register — observational markers, two-domain disclosure for precision.
Literary register — elevated diction, em-dash heavy.
Journalistic register — leads with the fact; sourced closings.
Poetic register — image-led markers (within bounded buckets), expansive disclosure.
registers.author_notes: Markers stay short — image-rich without runaway poetic licence; the lemma is the protagonist.

registers.description: Assertive register — declarative markers, no hedging.
Hedged register — soft markers signalling epistemic caution.

openings: As best as can be said:

closings: — what do you make of it?
— and there is more to explore.
— though one could argue the inverse.

registers.description: Skeptical register — cautious markers, defers judgement.
Register signalling confident epistemic humility — first-person framing without dropping precision.
Socratic register. Drops articles in cold-start surfaces and appends a probing question closing.

closings: — and from where do we know it?
— that's how it lands in the field.
— that is the shape of it.

registers.description: Journalist register — verb-led openings, sourced closings.
Academic register — Latinate cadence, conservative depth.
Technical register — precise, tag-bearing, two-domain disclosure.

closings: — though much depends on the framing.

registers.description: Pedagogical register. Standard depth; uses opening 'Recall:' and closing ' — does that make sense?' to scaffold learning.

registers.author_notes: Markers stay non-sectarian; no theological commitments at this layer.
Q.E.D. as a tag; drop articles to land in math idiom.

registers.description: Plainspoken register — Anglo-Saxon vocabulary, short markers.

closings: — that is the truth of it.

registers.description: Cosmopolitan register — international, careful with idiom.
Blunt register — short, sharp, no qualification.
Aristocratic register — elevated diction; depth=3 with appended clause.
Folksy register — regional warmth, light contractions.

closings: — and that's about the size of it.

registers.description: Timeless register — restrained, classic, no fashion-of-the-day markers.

closings: — and so it has long held.

registers.description: Contemporary register — current idiom without slang.
Classic register — measured English without archaisms.

closings: — and so it has long stood.

registers.description: Lyrical register — musical phrasing within bounded markers.

closings: — and so the line completes itself.

registers.description: Cheerful register — positive markers, no exclamation marks (deterministic, no affect-pretense).

closings: — though it has always been so.
— and that is no small thing.

registers.description: Wry register — slight irony, deadpan closings.

closings: — make of it what you will.

registers.description: Gentle register — soft openings, easy closings.

closings: — and that is what I mean.
— and there is more, when you want it.

registers.description: Warm, conversational register. Seeded openings and closings draw from small bounded buckets; depth follows the standard (3-domain) default.
Tutorial composite — combines pedagogical openings, instructional steps, expansive depth.
Interview composite — interviewer openings + probing closings.
Briefing composite — executive depth + journalist closings.
Deposition composite — legal qualification + documentary sourcing.

closings: — keep that for the next session.

registers.description: Memo composite — executive terseness + civic formality.

closings: — that is the shape of it.
